I terreni edificabili fanno eccezione: s: Buildable land is an exception: it is declared at market value, not cadastral. The result is indicative: any reliefs and special cases must be checked on the specific case — that's exactly the work we do.
Lorenzo lo verifica uno per uno. Se qual: Lorenzo checks them one by one. If something's wrong (blurry photo, missing page, wrong document) the item goes back to "to redo" with a note explaining what to fix: you re-upload the correct file and the case continues without starting over.
Il recesso è un tuo diritto di legge nei: Withdrawal is your legal right in the first 14 days. Our 'Satisfied or Refunded' guarantee is an extra promise we make: if you're not happy with our work, we'll talk and find a solution. Details on the Guarantee page.
Ogni pacchetto indica l'invio della dich: Each package states filing within a set number of business days from COMPLETE documentation (not from payment): so it's a promise we can truly keep. Third-party times (Agency, Cadastre, banks) are excluded.
Predispongo e trasmetto io la dichiarazi: I prepare and file the declaration myself: I'm authorised to do so. For the tax side I rely on accountants' supervision. So you get technical control of cadastral data and confidence in the figures, without splitting the case across different firms.
Per la dichiarazione di successione gli: For the succession declaration, properties are valued at cadastral value, not market price: income revalued by 5% multiplied by a statutory coefficient. For agricultural land: dominical income revalued by 25% × 90.
No: il valore catastale è quasi sempre m: No: cadastral value is almost always much lower than market value. It's the value used to calculate mortgage and cadastral taxes in the succession declaration, obtained from revalued income multiplied by a statutory coefficient.
Se almeno un erede ha i requisiti prima: If at least one heir meets the primary-residence requirements on the inherited property, mortgage and cadastral taxes are fixed (€200 each) instead of a percentage of cadastral value. We check if you qualify and state it in the declaration.
Verifichiamo a mano i dati catastali - p: We manually check cadastral data — parcels, subunits, outbuildings, title deeds — where cases most often get stuck. With accountants supervising the numbers. That's the difference between a filled form and a case done properly.
In alcuni casi (eredi diretti, solo liqu: In some cases (direct heirs, only modest liquidity within legal thresholds, no property) the declaration may not be required. We check your case before you pay: if you don't need it, we say so. Final verification is always on the specific case.
Sì. Sotto alcune voci della checklist tr: Yes. Under some checklist items you'll find ready forms (e.g. substitute declaration of death certificate and family status of the deceased, or self-certification of family status for each heir): download, fill in, sign and re-upload.
Molti si aspettano un commercialista, un: Many expect an accountant, a CAF or a notary. In succession, though, the delicate part is cadastral data: that's a surveyor's job. Filing needs an Entratel intermediary — I am one. A notary only steps in for later deeds, not for the declaration.
Scrivici pure su WhatsApp o via email ne: Write to us on WhatsApp or by email in your language: we understand each other. If you prefer to speak, we can do a call with real-time translation; important points (amounts, deadlines, documents) are always confirmed in writing. Official documents remain in Italian.
Il prezzo del pacchetto è l'onorario pro: The package price is the professional fee without VAT: the studio operates under the flat-rate regime (not subject to VAT). Succession taxes (mortgage, cadastral, stamps) are separate, paid by the heir via F24: we calculate and notify them BEFORE filing.
Spesso la successione è urgente (c'è una: Succession is often urgent (there's a 12-month deadline). If you ask us to start before the 14 days, we need explicit consent: once the service is completed, the right of withdrawal no longer applies. If work has only started but isn't finished, see the point below.
Lo emettiamo entro i termini di legge (d: We issue it within legal deadlines (normally 14 days from the request), with the same payment method you used. Once issued to the card, the bank normally credits it within 5–10 business days (Stripe/issuer timing). Any taxes already paid to the Treasury follow Agency rules, not ours.
Mi occupo di successioni ogni giorno. Da: I handle successions every day. As a surveyor, my strength is checking cadastral data — parcels, subunits, outbuildings, title deeds — where most cases get stuck. My goal is simple: take a burden off you at an already hard time, with clear prices and without sending you around offices and banks.
Dalle tue risposte emerge un caso con el: Your answers show a case with special elements (many properties, agricultural land, shares, businesses…). We can't lock a price here: it needs to be reviewed with Lorenzo, so you pay neither more nor less than fair. Leave your details below (and a note if you like) or write to us: we'll call back to clarify and prepare a dedicated quote.

Successioni Armellin è l'applicazione we: Successioni Armellin is the web app of Geom. Lorenzo Armellin's studio to manage your succession declaration online: you get a clear-priced quote, pay securely by card, and in your Client area you upload required documents, sign the mandate and follow the case step by step through filing with Agenzia delle Entrate. To access the Client area you can use email, phone or your Google account: in that case we only use your name and email to create and recognise your profile — no other account data is read or shared.
